case_title: STANDISH, SUSAN T VS GOODSON, WILLIAM H III M.D. et al

DECLARATION OF LOST DUCES TECUM ORIGINAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STANDISH, SUSAN T RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOODSON, WILLIAM H III M.D. INTERPLAN CORPORATION $587.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $633.00, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST AS TO DEFENDANT GOODSON. PARTIES HAVE SETTLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $849.04 FILED BY STANDISH, SUSAN T AS TO DEFENDANT GOODSON, WILLIAM H III M.D. INTERPLAN CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-01-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
